questions.q: Researchers in Ireland recently tracked down a forgotten medieval book in a Roman library that hides the oldest surviving English poem, known as what?
By winning the 2026 PGA Championship, Aaron Rai became the first player born in which country to capture the major in more than a century?
In May 2026, the Trump administration removed key landmark regulations against which group of "forever" toxins?
Which player scored 41 points and grabbed 24 rebounds to lead the Spurs to a double-overtime victory over the Thunder in Game 1 of the 2026 Western Conference finals?
According to a recent interview, what is Barnes & Noble CEO James Daunt's stance on selling AI-written books in their stores?
options: He supports selling them if they are clearly labeled and there is public demand.
He wants to ban all books containing any AI-generated text from physical shelves.
He plans to replace self-published authors with Barnes & Noble's own AI models.
He believes AI books should only be sold digitally, not in print.
questions.correctText: He supports selling them if they are clearly labeled and there is public demand.

questions.q: Which prolific voice actor, known for playing Yoda in 'Star Wars: The Clone Wars', passed away at age 64 according to reports on May 18, 2026?
Colorado public health officials investigated a 2026 death caused by which virus, which was notably unlinked to a recent cruise ship cluster?
Doireann Ní Ghríofa's newly reviewed book 'Said the Dead' explores the lives of forgotten patients at which historical psychiatric facility in Ireland?
On May 18, 2026, Paramount dropped eight new parody posters for the upcoming sixth installment of which comedy horror franchise, spoofing films like 'Get Out' and 'Sinners'?
options: Shriek If You Know What I Did

questions.q: The live-action reboot of 'Masters of the Universe' had its world premiere in Los Angeles on May 18, 2026. Which actor stars as Prince Adam/He-Man?
